title: String Tools (Fabric)
body:
# String Tools

DavidDGTNT's first mod! Make use of the string you have sitting around in your storage system for one-use tools you can use to troll your friends, or have it in a modpack as a joke!

## Items included

* Stick of String (stringtools:string_stick)
* String Sword (stringtools:string_sword)
* String Pickaxe (stringtools:string_pickaxe)
* String Axe (stringtools:string_axe)
* String Shovel (stringtools:string_shovel)
* String Hoe (stringtools:string_hoe)

## Recipes

We recommend [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) to access recipes.
